'''Abadaner''' was a member of the [[Five Worlds]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] working as insurgents on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He along with other Corellians were working with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ailyn Vel|Ailyn Habuur]], though they were arrested after [[Ben Skywalker]] had a hunch about explosives in the area where they were located.<ref name="Bloodlines" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1stm}}
